articles.title: France, UK and Spain see record temperatures as heatwave grips western Europe - BBC
articles.description: Tens of millions of people are grappling with punishing temperatures, which have led to red heat alerts across the continent.
articles.content: The Dutch weather service, the KNMI, has issued a Code Orange weather alert, which refers to a "high chance of dangerous weather" in southern and central areas of the Netherlands from Wednesday until… [+16 chars]
